## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` · `npm run typecheck` · `npm run test` · `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Screenshots for UI changes (before/after)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed (`.env`, `flight.xls`)
